parameters.query:
INSERT INTO config.temu_credentials (app_key, access_token, mall_id, expires_at, updated_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::timestamptz, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (app_key) DO UPDATE SET
  access_token = EXCLUDED.access_token,
  mall_id      = EXCLUDED.mall_id,
  expires_at   = EXCLUDED.expires_at,
  updated_at   = NOW()
RETURNING id, app_key, mall_id, expires_at;
